action_set_definitions.name: get_site_state
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current environment state for specific categories such as 'environmental_conditions', 'grid_layout', or 'site_resources'.

category.description: The category of state information to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: get_project_config
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the required synchronization protocols and data-entry standards for a specific job archive.

archive_id.description: The name of the digital job file/archive (e.g., 'BARROW_A_ARCHIVE').

action_set_definitions.name: set_instrument_atmospherics
action_set_definitions.description: Configures the Total Station with real-time temperature and pressure to ensure EDM accuracy.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_entry_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the local data-entry system with the project's central database using a protocol ID.

protocol_id.description: The ID or token retrieved from project configuration.

action_set_definitions.name: take_measurement
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the Total Station to measure the coordinate of a target point.

action_set_definitions.name: archive_measurement
action_set_definitions.description: Permanently commits the verified measurement data to the digital job archive.

measurement_data.description: The coordinate and residual data to store.

state_description.grid_layout: A 2D array or list of objects representing the excavation coordinates, each containing status (e.g., unassigned, active, completed) and soil type.
state_description.available_teams: List of specialized teams available for assignment, including their expertise level and current workload.
state_description.site_resources: Inventory of equipment such as shovels, brushes, and scanners, including their remaining durability.
state_description.environmental_conditions: Current weather or safety conditions at the site affecting operational efficiency.

available_teams: Team Alpha (Expertise: Topographic Surveying, Workload: Low)
Team Beta (Expertise: Stratigraphic Excavation, Workload: High)
task_initial_state.environmental_conditions: Severe Heat Shimmer; Ambient Temperature: 39C; Air Pressure: 1012hPa
